result.stdout_text:
memory: Search, store, or inspect lightweight runtime-scoped working memory.
Usage: memory search <query> | memory recent [N] | memory store <text>

This is lightweight runtime memory for the current agent session. It is not file storage or semantic retrieval infrastructure.
Examples:
  memory store "Acme prefers Monday follow-ups"
  memory search "Acme follow-up"
  memory recent 5
